title: Gift tax rules explained: Who can give you money or assets without tax implications?
summary: Gifts exceeding ₹50,000 are taxable under the Income Tax Act as income from other sources. Exemptions apply for gifts from relatives or on special occasions. Full list of exemptions here.

title: You can earn up to ₹69,000 monthly income from ₹1 crore FD in small finance banks. Here's how
summary: Small finance bank FDs can help deliver attractive monthly income on ₹1 crore deposits, with senior citizens earning higher returns through competitive fixed deposit interest rates.

title: Buying or selling property in India as an NRI? Here are the rules you should know
summary: Non-Resident Indians can buy property in India under FEMA and RBI regulations. They may purchase residential and commercial properties, but agricultural land is subject to restrictions.&nbsp;

title: Domestic travellers can now buy annual travel insurance for frequent trips: What's included, how it works and more
summary: The domestic travel insurance policy provides protection against several travel-specific risks and crises, including a personal injury benefit reaching ₹3 lakh and medical facility coverage up to ₹1 lakh during transit.

title: EPFO plans auto-settlement for final PF withdrawals. How will it benefit its 7 crore members?
summary: The EPFO auto-settlement facility aims to accelerate final PF withdrawals, reduce paperwork and streamline account transfers through a fully digital system for its more than seven crore members.

title: UPI's per-day and per-transaction limit set at ₹2 lakh in Europe. What it means for users
summary: The per-transaction and per-day limit for UPI Global Acceptance in Europe (peer-to-merchant) has now been increased to ₹2 lakh. Each member bank may set its own norms, subject to the overall applicable limits, NPCI has said.

title: Did you receive money in your bank account by mistake? Follow these steps to avoid tax liability
summary: Unexpected bank credits can become taxable unexplained income; follow prompt steps—do not use funds, notify the bank and sender, document everything, and consult a tax professional to avoid tax liability.&nbsp;

title: What happens to your EPF account if you become an NRI? Rules explained
summary: The EPF account remains active when an Indian becomes an NRI, but rules for contributions and withdrawals change. NRIs must meet eligibility conditions to withdraw funds online. Details here.

title: How rising crude oil prices and market volatility could impact your personal finances
summary: Stock market volatility driven by rising crude oil prices, FII sell-offs, and inflation concerns reshapes the personal finance outlook, underscoring the importance of disciplined SIP investing, diversification, and long-term wealth creation.&nbsp;

title: What the US CLARITY Act could mean for India’s crypto future – Expert says, ‘rules must fit India’s large market’
summary: The Senate Banking Committee advanced the CLARITY Act, aiming to regulate cryptocurrencies amid industry tensions. Supported by some Democrats, the bill moves to the full Senate, indicating a shift towards structured crypto policymaking and potential global regulatory implications.

title: Sebi, CBDT ease PAN rules for foreign investors after onboarding concerns
summary: Sebi and CBDT relaxed PAN compliance requirements for foreign portfolio investors after concerns over complex onboarding rules. title: Sebi expands permitted use of borrowings for highly leveraged InvITs
summary: The changes, which have come into force with immediate effect, are aimed at providing greater flexibility to InvITs in managing funding requirements.

title: US stocks today: S&P, Nasdaq plunge 1% at open as yields jump on inflation worries
summary: Wall ​Street ​indexes opened sharply lower ​on Friday, as inflation fears triggered ‌by ⁠the ⁠Middle East conflict ​drove up Treasury yields ​and threatened to halt an AI-fueled ​rally.

title: ITC Hotels Q4 PAT at Rs 317 crore, chain posts revenue of Rs 1,254 crore
summary: ITC Hotels posted strong FY26 growth with higher revenue, profit and record hotel signings. The company acquired a luxury resort in Kumarakom, expanded its managed pipeline, maintained industry-leading RevPAR and outlined plans to scale operations to 250 hotels by 2031.

title: Tata Steel Q4 Results: Cons PAT soars 147% YoY to Rs 2,965 crore, revenue jumps 13%
summary: Tata Steel Q4 Results: Tata Steel reported a consolidated net profit of Rs 2,965 crore in the March-ended quarter versus Rs 1,201 crore in the year ago period, a 147% YoY growth.

title: Quote of the day by Marty Whitman: "As a value investor, what you are interested in is whether the company is creating wealth"
summary: Marty Whitman, a legendary investor, emphasized wealth creation. Value investors look beyond daily price swings to a company's core business.
